ABOUT US

Pioneering Aquaculture Health Solutions

Innovare Biopharma LLP is a leading innovator in aquaculture health, committed to developing sustainable and effective biopharma solutions for the global aquaculture industry.

Our Mission
Deliver innovative biopharma solutions that enhance aquaculture health, productivity, and sustainability across the globe.
Our Vision
Become the world's leading provider of eco-friendly aquaculture health solutions, nurturing healthier aquatic ecosystems.
Quality First
Every product undergoes rigorous quality testing under strict GMP guidelines for maximum efficacy and safety.
Expert Team
Aquaculture scientists, marine biologists, and pharma experts working together to create breakthrough solutions.
5+YEARS GROWTH
3SOLUTION DOMAINS
1000+CLIENTS
33+PRODUCTS
OUR SOLUTIONS

Comprehensive Aquaculture Solutions

We offer a complete range of biopharma solutions designed to address every aspect of aquaculture health and productivity.

Water Quality Management
Advanced probiotics and bio-remediators that maintain optimal water parameters, reduce ammonia and nitrite levels, and promote healthy aquatic environments.
Disease Prevention
Innovative immunostimulants and natural antimicrobial solutions that boost the immune system of aquatic species and prevent disease outbreaks.
Gut Health & Nutrition
Specialized feed supplements and gut-health enhancers that improve feed conversion ratio, growth performance, and overall health of aquatic organisms.
Soil & Pond Preparation
Bio-tech solutions for pond preparation, soil remediation, and organic matter decomposition ensuring ideal conditions before stocking.
Organic Aquaculture
Certified organic products and natural growth promoters for chemical-free aquaculture farming that meets international export standards.
Hatchery Solutions
Specialized solutions for larval rearing, broodstock management, and early-stage nutrition to maximize survival rates in hatcheries.
Tailored solutions for every aquaculture challenge
Our R&D team continuously develops new formulations to address emerging challenges in the aquaculture industry.
SUSTAINABILITY

Committed to a Greener Future

At Innovare Biopharma, sustainability isn't just a buzzword — it's embedded in every product we create and every decision we make.

Our Sustainability Commitment

We believe that healthy aquaculture and a healthy environment go hand in hand. Our products are engineered to enhance farm productivity while preserving the natural integrity of aquatic ecosystems.

🚫 Antibiotic-Free Farming♻️ Reduced Carbon Footprint💧 Water Conservation🦋 Biodiversity Support🤝 Farmer Empowerment🐟 Clean Water Initiative
🌍
100%
Biodegradable
Environmental Safety
All our products are tested for environmental impact and are biodegradable, leaving no harmful residues in water bodies.
🐠
Zero
Harmful Chemicals
Aquatic Ecosystem
We design solutions that promote natural ecological balance, supporting healthy plankton blooms and beneficial microbial communities.
👨‍🌾
1000+
Farmers Trained
Farmer Welfare
Our programs include farmer education, training workshops, and technical support to ensure sustainable livelihoods.
♻️
100%
Eco-Friendly Manufacturing
Sustainable Production
Our manufacturing process focuses on reducing waste, energy efficiency, and environmentally responsible practices.
CERTIFICATES

Quality Certifications & Compliance

Our commitment to quality is backed by internationally recognised certifications and regulatory compliance standards.

Internationally Recognised Standards

ISO 9001:2015
Quality Management System
Ensuring consistent product quality and continuous improvement across all operations.
GMP Certified
Good Manufacturing Practice
Manufacturing processes meet the highest standards of quality and safety.
CAA Certified
Coastal Aquaculture Authority
Approved by India's Coastal Aquaculture Authority for aquaculture and feed supplement compliance.
OUR JOURNEY

Milestones that shaped us

From our founding in 2020 to a global footprint across 15+ countries — each year has brought new achievements.

2020Foundation

Innovare Biopharma LLP incorporated in Hyderabad with state-of-the-art manufacturing & R&D infrastructure.

2021First Products

Launched flagship aqua growth promoters, sanitizers and probiotics — immediately recognised for superior efficacy.

2022Portfolio Expansion

Extended product lines to include vitamins, minerals, water & soil probiotics covering the full aqua lifecycle.

2023Export Ready

Achieved international quality certifications and began exporting to 15+ countries across Asia and the Middle East.

2024Expansion

Strengthened global presence with deeper market penetration, expanded distribution and enhanced product reliability.

2025Global Growth

Delivering 33+ innovative aquaculture products trusted by farms worldwide for quality and performance.

EVENTS & GALLERY

Our Events & Memories

From aquaculture conferences and product launches to international tours — every event is a step toward healthier aquatic ecosystems.
